title: 70 Pcs Plasterboard Fixings Heavy Duty,Metal Wall Plugs and Screws,Self Drill Drywall Fixings Set,Cavity Raw Plugs,Dry Wall Anchor for Plaster Boards,Composite Boards,Wooden Boards
features: 【Materials for production】:Plasterboard anchor bolts are made of hard zinc alloy material casting, strong, durable, strong load-bearing capacity, tapered appearance design, more conducive to the fixing, self-tapping threads can also be maintained to maintain the maximum tight fit;

【Product Advantage】: Zinc alloy material, rust and corrosion resistance, can be used for a long time, the entire anchor bolt presents a tapered structure, self-tapping threads without drilling first, you can easily drill into the gypsum board, the anchor bolt threads are wide and protruding, the contact surface price is large, which is more conducive to close fixing, the internal cavity is conducive to the fixing of self-tapping screws.
【Kit Contains】:20 PCS M4*13*32 short anchor bolts ,15 PCS M4*13*42 long anchor bolts, matching self-tapping screws 35 PCS, to meet your different needs;

【Use scope】: suitable for fixing electric boxes, sockets, curtain rods, lamp holders, sanitary ware, all kinds of brackets, hooks, mirrors, handrails and so on, screws and anchors are easy to load and unload, can be reused.

【Storage And Service】: storage is convenient, all products are stored in a plastic packaging box to prevent children from swallowing and scratching by mistake. It is also convenient for your access. If you have any questions, please contact us in time, we will provide you with services as soon as possible, hope you like the products we provide.
